Plot Ensemble Predictions from a mosaic_ensemble Object

Source: R/plot_model_ensemble.R
plot_model_ensemble.Rd

Renders time-series plots from a mosaic_ensemble object produced by calc_model_ensemble. Shows the weighted median prediction line with confidence interval ribbons and observed data points. Optionally saves per-location prediction CSVs for downstream use.

Usage

plot_model_ensemble(
  ensemble,
  output_dir,
  save_predictions = FALSE,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

ensemble

A mosaic_ensemble object returned by calc_model_ensemble.

output_dir

Character. Directory where plots and CSVs are saved. Created if it does not exist.

save_predictions

Logical. Save per-location prediction CSVs. Default FALSE.

verbose

Logical. Print progress messages. Default TRUE.

Value

Invisibly returns a list with:

individual

Named list of ggplot objects, one per location.

cases_faceted

Faceted cases plot (multi-location only).

deaths_faceted

Faceted deaths plot (multi-location only).

simulation_stats

Simulation metadata from the ensemble object.

See also

calc_model_ensemble to compute the ensemble.
